name: PJSC ACRON GDR (10 GDRS REPR 1
summary: PJSC Acron is a leading Russian vertically integrated mineral fertilizer producer with operations spanning the entire value chain, from mining raw materials to producing a wide range of fertilizers. The company produces nitrogen and complex fertilizers, as well as a range of industrial products, and is headquartered in Veliky Novgorod, Russia. Acron sells its products both domestically and internationally.
